description_long: This is a glossy black ceramic cup filled with a latte, featuring a visible layer of latte art on the surface. The cup has a rounded body with a pronounced, smoothly curved handle attached to one side, and it sits on a simple, flat, light gray saucer. A metallic teaspoon rests on the saucer, positioned differently in each view, indicating it is a separate, movable component. The cup's surface is highly reflective, giving it a sleek and polished appearance, while the interior is filled with a creamy, brown beverage. There are no visible logos, branding, or decorative patterns on the cup, and the overall design is modern and minimalist.
description: A glossy black ceramic cup with a handle, filled with latte art, sits on a light gray saucer with a metallic teaspoon. The design is modern, minimalist, and highly reflective.
description_view_0: Front view showing the cup's rounded body, latte art, and the handle partially visible on the right, with the teaspoon mostly hidden behind the cup.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the full handle on the left and the teaspoon extending outward on the right side of the saucer.
description_view_2: Rear view with the handle not visible, the teaspoon placed directly in front of the cup on the saucer, and the latte art clearly seen.
description_view_3: Side view with the handle fully visible on the right and the teaspoon resting on the left side of the saucer.
